item.title: How to prevent overlap by customized content(e.g. div and img)?
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: ScenarioImagine that Your e-shop website allows users to publish their products(i.e. text, img) by themselves, even input some CSS to decorate the content. The published product will be show in a individual detail page with a rating (e.g. stars) on the top of the page. A foxy and technical users want to overlap the rating div with 5 stars by writting a pice of CSS. like this: SolutionsHow to disable the cheating?
